title: TileProperties
description: An immutable, flat key-value bag of generic tile properties. Adapters copy and freeze source properties; the runtime never retains a caller-owned mutable object. Declared as an interface (not a `Record<...>` type alias) so it can mutually recurse with TilePropertyValue — a nested-bag member of that union — without TypeScript's "circularly references itself" alias restriction; structurally it behaves exactly like `Readonly<Record<string, TilePropertyValue>>`.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: An immutable, flat key-value bag of generic tile properties. Adapters copy and freeze source properties; the runtime never retains a caller-owned mutable object.

Declared as an interface (not a `Record<...>` type alias) so it can mutually recurse with TilePropertyValue — a nested-bag member of that union — without TypeScript's "circularly references itself" alias restriction; structurally it behaves exactly like `Readonly<Record<string, TilePropertyValue>>`.
